mapper.select: SELECT id, organization, name, source, last_sync_time FROM repository WHERE LOWER(organization) = LOWER(#{organization}) AND LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{name}) AND source = #{source} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, organization, name, source, last_sync_time FROM repository WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
INSERT INTO repository (project_id, organization, name, source) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{repository.organization}, #{repository.name}, #{repository.source}) RETURNING id
